title: Require void return for @InitBinder methods
description: @InitBinder methods in Spring should always have a void return type to ensure proper binding configuration. Returning a value from these methods can cause unexpected behavior and is not supported by the framework. This rule enforces the correct method signature for maintainability and reliability.
recommendation: Update all @InitBinder methods to have a void return type. Remove any return statements or change the method signature as needed.

checks.message: Update all @InitBinder methods to have a void return type. Remove any return statements or change the method signature as needed.
